title: Arasavalli Sun Temple
tagline: Arasavalli Sun Temple — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Arasavalli Sri Surya Narayana Swamy Devalayam is a temple for Lord Surya, the solar deity, at Arasavalli in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh.
overview.description: Arasavalli Sri Surya Narayana Swamy Devalayam is a temple for Lord Surya, the solar deity, at Arasavalli in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Arasavalli Village 1 km east of Srikakulam. It is believed that the temple was built in 7th century CE by King Devendra Varma, a great ruler of Eastern Ganga Dynasty of Kalinga. The present structure is largely a result of 18th-century renovations.

topPlaces.name: Srikakulam
topPlaces.description: Srikakulam is a city and the headquarters of Srikakulam district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. As of 2011 census, it has a population of 165,735.

topPlaces.name: Arasavalli
topPlaces.description: Arasavalli is an neighborhood of Srikakulam in Srikakulam district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Srikakulam mandal of Srikakulam revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Srikakulam
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Srikakulam (Latin: Srikakulamen(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Srikakulam in the ecclesiastical province of Visakhapatnam in India.

topPlaces.name: Fareed Peta
topPlaces.description: Fareed Peta is a village in the Etcherla mandal in Srikakulam District in the state of Andhra Pradesh in India.

topPlaces.name: Kinthali
topPlaces.description: Kinthali is a village in Srikakulam district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Ponduru mandal of Srikakulam revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Shermuhammadpuram
topPlaces.description: Shermuhammadpuram is a village located in Etcherla mandal in Srikakulam district, northeastern Andhra Pradesh, India. It is located 7 miles (11 km) east of Chipurupalle, and 4 miles (6.4 km) west of Srikakulam (Chicacole).

topPlaces.name: Kallepalli
topPlaces.description: Pedda Ganagalla Peta or Ganagalla Peta is a village located around 5 kilometers from Srikakulam town in Andhra Pradesh, India. River Nagavali near the village Ganagalla Peta.

topPlaces.name: Etcherla
topPlaces.description: Etcherla is a village in Srikakulam district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is the Mandal headquarters of Etcherla mandal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Arasavalli Sun Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Arasavalli Sun Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Arasavalli Sun Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Visakhapatnam Airport (96 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (90 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Arasavalli Sun Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Arasavalli Sun Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Arasavalli Sun Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Arasavalli Sun Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Arasavalli Sun Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Srikakulam, Arasavalli, Diocese of Srikakulam, Fareed Peta, Kinthali.
